title: Senior Doctor - Granules India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Granules India Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Granules India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Granules India Advisory Limited:
Granules India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India Advisory Limited!
